metadata.description: Developer productivity skills and agents for GitHub Copilot CLI.

plugins.name: codev
plugins.description: Guided four-stage development workflow (Understand -> Plan -> Implement -> Review) that takes a task brief, clarifies requirements, hands off to plan mode, drives the implementation, and runs a review.

plugins.name: deep-analysis
plugins.description: Performs deep codebase, architecture, or general-purpose analysis from a user prompt and generates a polished, self-contained light-theme HTML report of the findings.

plugins.name: explain-change
plugins.description: Produces a rich, interactive HTML explanation of a code change, diff, branch, or PR — with a deep Background, an Intuition section (diagrams + toy examples), a Code walkthrough, and an interactive multiple-choice Quiz.
